summary: E-commerce/crystal website project with trust & social proof features, engagement & retention features, and a wishlist. Now adding a website rating display (100 stars out of 0) in the upper-right corner near the wishlist.

existing_features.title: Add a website rating display in the upper-right corner of the Header component, positioned alongside the existing wishlist button. The rating should visually show '100 / 100 stars' using a star icon and numeric label (e.g., '★ 100' or '100★' with a label like 'Rating'). Style it consistently with the existing header elements (blue-crystal-moon palette).

new_feature_requests.summary: Display website rating as 100 stars (from 0) in the upper-right corner alongside the wishlist
